title: atalanthus divaricatus
intro: Atalanthus divaricatus, also known as divaricate atalanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections. Atalanthus divaricatus can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
